title: BYND absolutely on fire — AI nailed this one
author: ExplanationNormal339
selftext:
https://preview.redd.it/syb9224r1iwf1.png?width=448&format=png&auto=webp&s=e9f695ea9353274293176604a60e0d28e601dd61

Everyone’s watching BYND right now and it’s going nuts again. Up more than **+324%** and still ripping. What’s crazy is that an AI model flagged this setup days ago with a Strong Buy at $0.65, calling a bullish breakout before it even started.

Now it’s sitting at $2.74 and already hit target. Volume is insane, sentiment flipped completely, and short traders are getting burned in real time.

Not financial advice, just wild to see an algo predict this move this clean.

[aimytrade.io/ticker/BYND](https://aimytrade.io/ticker/BYND)

comments.author: Selzerr
comments.body: Anyone that's not promoting their Saas that can giv e their opinion on this website ?
